header.note: The source node in most cases contains the sample message as written by the developer. If it looks like a dot-delimitted string such as "form.label.firstname", then the developer has not provided a default message.

trans-unit.resname: Stage '%stageName%' in Workflow '%workflowName%' does not exist
trans-unit.source: Stage '%stageName%' in Workflow '%workflowName%' does not exist
trans-unit.note: key: Stage '%stageName%' in Workflow '%workflowName%' does not exist

trans-unit.resname: Transition '%transitionName%' in Workflow '%workflowName%' does not exist
trans-unit.source: Transition '%transitionName%' in Workflow '%workflowName%' does not exist
trans-unit.note: key: Transition '%transitionName%' in Workflow '%workflowName%' does not exist

trans-unit.resname: Version is assigned to another user (%name%) since %modified%.
trans-unit.source: Version is assigned to another user (%name%) since %modified%.
trans-unit.note: key: Version is assigned to another user (%name%) since %modified%.
